description: Use this API to select time series power flow Cchannels. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = tspf_channel_data(element,field,option)

parameters.name: option
parameters.description: Flag to skip the monitored element. (input; 0 by default).

error_codes.description: Unrecognized data type of the element.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
